'''Zarfeen''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]].

==Biography==
Employed by the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] crime syndicate's [[Clezo]], she was sent by the group to retrieve [[Celis Mott]]'s lost treasure when word got out that [[Marka Durn]] had discovered the horde. Sadly, it was too little too late, and the treasure eluded her.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=The Treasure of Celis Mott|book=Instant Adventures}} {{1st}}
